title: Add study streak tracking, session history, custom timer settings, motivational quotes, and statistics dashboard

requirements.summary: Implement study streak tracking that counts consecutive days with at least one completed study session and displays current streak count in the UI
acceptanceCriteria: Streak increments when user completes a session on a new calendar day
Streak resets to 1 if more than one day has passed since last session
Frontend displays current streak count prominently in the UI
Streak persists across browser sessions and app upgrades

file_operations.description: Create React Query hook that fetches current streak from backend using getCurrentStreak method and provides streak data to components with automatic refetch on session completion
Create component that displays current streak count with fire emoji and day counter, using useStudyStreak hook, with loading and error states
Add StreakDisplay component to authenticated user layout, positioned prominently near the timer section
Integrate backend endSession call when timer completes a work session, passing timestamp to record session completion and trigger streak calculation

requirements.summary: Create session history feature that records all completed study sessions and displays them in a chronological list
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend displays sessions in reverse chronological order (newest first)
Each session entry shows date, time, duration, and type
Display total time studied across all sessions
Session history is filterable by date range or session type

file_operations.description: Create React Query hook that fetches session history from backend using getSessions method, transforms backend StudySession data into displayable format with duration calculations

Create component displaying session list in reverse chronological order with date/time formatting, duration display, and total time calculation, including filter controls for date range and session type
Create component rendering individual session entry with formatted date, time, duration display in minutes/hours, and visual indicator for work vs break sessions
Add SessionHistory component to authenticated user layout below the timer section
Call backend startSession when timer starts and endSession when timer completes, passing timestamps to record session data

requirements.summary: Add custom timer settings that allow users to adjust work session and break durations with a settings UI
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend provides settings interface with input controls for work and break durations
Duration ranges are validated (minimum 1 minute, maximum 90 minutes)
Custom durations apply to new timer sessions immediately after saving
Settings persist across browser sessions
Default values remain 25 minutes for work and 5 minutes for breaks

file_operations.description: Create React Query hook that fetches user settings from backend using getSettings method and provides mutation for updating settings via updateSettings method with optimistic updates
Create settings form component with number inputs for work and break durations, validation for 1-90 minute range, save button, and loading states using useTimerSettings hook
Integrate useTimerSettings hook to retrieve custom work and break durations from backend settings instead of hardcoded 25/5 values, updating timer initialization to use fetched durations
Add TimerSettings component to authenticated user layout, positioned in an expandable settings panel or modal accessible via settings icon

requirements.summary: Display daily motivational quotes that rotate and appear in the UI with study-focused inspirational messages
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend maintains a collection of at least 30 study-focused motivational quotes
Display one random quote per day that remains consistent throughout the day
Quote appears in a dedicated section of the UI with appropriate styling
Quote changes at midnight local time
Quote display is visible to authenticated users

file_operations.description: Create array of at least 30 study-focused motivational quotes with author attributions
Create hook that selects one quote per day using date-based deterministic selection (not random), ensuring quote remains consistent throughout the day and changes at midnight local time
Create component displaying the daily quote with appropriate styling using warm earthy colors, quote marks, and author attribution, integrating useDailyQuote hook
Add DailyQuote component to authenticated user layout, positioned prominently near the top of the interface

requirements.summary: Create a study statistics dashboard with charts visualizing study patterns including daily study time, weekly trends, and session distribution
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend displays interactive charts showing study time trends over selectable periods
Dashboard shows total study time, average session length, and most productive time of day
Charts update in real-time as new sessions are completed
Dashboard is accessible via navigation and displays data only for authenticated users
Use a charting library compatible with React and the existing tech stack

file_operations.description: Create React Query hook that fetches statistics from backend using getStatistics method, providing daily, weekly, and session distribution data with automatic refetch on session completion
Create dashboard component that displays total study time, average session length, and most productive time of day using data from useStudyStatistics hook, with loading and error states
Create chart component using recharts library to render interactive line and bar charts for daily study time, weekly trends, and session distribution, with period selector dropdown
Add StatisticsDashboard component to authenticated user layout below session history, creating a dedicated statistics section
Add recharts charting library dependency to support interactive chart rendering with React compatibility
